violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (steam kettle lid) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the dairy kosher kitchen refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. PIC placed thermometers in units during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener in dairy kitchen) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity for proper cooling for catering. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024
